overview: Functional medicine clinic offering comprehensive, integrative care for the whole family with focus on treating underlying causes of chronic conditions. Also provides medical aesthetics and spa services.
highlights: Medical aesthetics services (skin rejuvenation, microneedling, body sculpting, laser treatments)
Treats chronic conditions including autoimmune disease, thyroid disorders, and hormonal imbalances
targetAudience: Patients with chronic health conditions seeking root-cause functional medicine treatment, and those interested in aesthetic services.
